Collections.rule:
Individual: @E*(mm:hashEncode)
   Types: Country
   Facts: name @E*(xsd:string)
   Annotations: rdfs:label @E*

Individual: @A*(mm:hashEncode)
  Types: City
  Facts: name @A*(xsd:string),
              name_ascii @B*(xsd:string),
              cityIsLocatedIn @E*(mm:hashEncode)
  Annotations: rdfs:label @A*
